source.default: SELECT A.[Id] as [Value], A.[UniqueCode] as [Text] FROM [db_default].[Animals] A inner join [db_default].[Lots] L on A.LotId = L.Id WHERE L.FarmId = @FarmId and A.IsDeleted = 0
source.sqlite: SELECT A.[Id] as [Value], A.[UniqueCode] as [Text] FROM [db_default_Animals] A inner join [db_default_Lots] L on A.LotId = L.Id WHERE L.FarmId = @FarmId and A.IsDeleted = 0

description.en: Unique code of the stallion from the next to last service
description.es: Código único del reproductor del penúltimo servicio
description.pt: Código único do garanhão do penúltimo serviço
